arts.ttl: “If you say it out loud” – Bournemouth star speaks of season goal, reveals disbelief at form
arts.sum: Justin Kluivert has made his truly mark for Bournemouth this season. The Dutchman has 11 Premier League goals and has racked up five assists, having notched up two hat-tricks already in the season.
